name: buildMarkIndex
summary: Build an in-memory lookup of reviewed memory marks by target.

name: getMemoryMarks
summary: Read and validate durable memory mark records from disk.

name: getTargetMarks
summary: Return reviewed marks for one target from a mark index.

name: prioritizeByMarks
summary: Sort candidate records so marked memory targets surface first.

name: getMemoryFreshness
summary: Read sync-state freshness and report whether memory mirrors are stale.

name: MEMORY_STATUS_UNAVAILABLE_WARNING
summary: Reviewed warning text for unavailable memory freshness truth.

name: STALE_MEMORY_WARNING
summary: Reviewed warning text for stale memory freshness state.

name: getMemorySyncState
summary: Read the last persisted memory sync-state artifact.

name: renderDecisionLogMirror
summary: Render the reviewed decision-log mirror from structured inputs.

name: renderProjectOverviewMirror
summary: Render the reviewed project-overview mirror from structured inputs.

name: syncMemory
summary: Write the durable memory mirror surface and validated sync-state file.
